aboutBanner: Specialty of Cho Lach, Ben Tre
aboutHeroDesc: Delicious flavor, naturally ripened, export-quality standard from the fertile alluvial land.
aboutP1: Located in the fertile alluvial land of Cho Lach, Ben Tre – known as the "cradle" of the sweetest fruits of the Mekong Delta, UT THOA DURIAN CO., LTD is proud to be the leading reputable durian supplier in the region.
aboutQuote: "We are not just suppliers, but also farmers who deeply understand every tree and every flavor of the 'king of fruits'."
aboutP2: Committed to delivering export-quality products, Ut Thoa has been affirming its position in Vietnam's agricultural market.
ftAddrVal: Tan Thanh, Tan Thieng, Cho Lach, Ben Tre
ftDesc: Ut Thoa Durian provides diverse, fresh, ripe durian products with the characteristic flavor from Cho Lach, Ben Tre.

brandStoryP1: Starting from a small garden in fertile land, Ut Thoa Durian has been nurtured by passion and great love for Vietnamese agriculture. We believe that each durian is not just a fruit, but the crystallization of earth and the sweat of farmers.
brandStoryP2: After many years dedicated to durian trees, we have continuously learned and applied proper cultivation methods, harmoniously combining modern techniques with sustainable agricultural philosophy. Each harvest, we carefully nurture every tree from flowering to ripening, ensuring complete flavor and absolute safety for consumers.
qualityCommit1Desc: No chemicals to accelerate ripening, ensuring the authentic sweet and creamy flavor.
qualityCommit2Desc: Fruits harvested directly from our own orchards, with strict quality control throughout the process.
qualityCommit3Desc: Committed to "1-for-1" exchange if the product is unripe, bland, or does not meet quality standards.
varietiesSubtitle: Each durian variety carries its own symphony of flavors, from delicately sweet to richly creamy.
ri6Desc: Famous for its vibrant yellow color, dry flesh, flat seeds and characteristic rich creamy flavor.
monthongDesc: Large fruit, thick and meaty flesh, delicately sweet flavor and mild fragrance, easy to enjoy.
musangDesc: Dubbed the king of durians, with butter-smooth texture and an enchanting bittersweet flavor.
article1Title: How to choose ripe, delicious durians by sound and scent
article1Desc: Listening to the knocking sound and recognizing the aroma are the two most important skills to find the perfect durian.
article2Title: How to keep durians fresh for many days
article2Desc: The ideal temperature and containers to retain the full flavor.
article3Title: Surprising health benefits of the King of Fruits
article3Desc: Discover the rich energy and minerals packed in every segment of durian.
article4Title: 5 delicious dishes made from durian you must try
article4Desc: From durian sweet soup, crepe cakes to cool durian ice cream for summer days.
heroFeaturedSubtitle: The finest durian varieties of this season
why1Desc: What you see is what you get. All products on the website are photographed directly from Ut Thoa orchard, without virtual editing.
why2Desc: Quality down to every segment. Ready to exchange for a new fruit immediately if the durian is unripe, bland, or damaged during shipping.
why3Desc: Cultivated to organic standards, no pesticides and chemical preservatives.
handbookSubtitle: Elevate your durian experience with tips and knowledge from experts.
culDesc: From elegant desserts to elevated breakfasts — the culinary art of the King of Fruits.
culIntro: Durian isn't just for eating fresh. With its creamy texture and unmistakable aroma, it can be transformed into a myriad of delicious dishes.
dish1Desc: Thin, soft crepe layers enveloping rich whipping cream and golden ripe durian flesh.
dish1Tip: Use cake flour for a thinner and chewier crepe layer.
dish2Desc: Combining fresh durian with rich coconut milk, mung beans, and crunchy coconut jelly.
dish2Tip: Chill the durian flesh for 30 minutes before preparing.
dish3Desc: Just 3 ingredients: durian, condensed milk, and whipped cream. Smooth as Italian gelato.
dish3Tip: Freeze for at least 6 hours. Take it out 5 mins before eating.
dish4Title: Durian Sticky Rice with Coconut Milk
dish4Desc: Fragrant sticky rice cooked with coconut milk, topped with a layer of golden durian.
dish4Tip: Soak sticky rice overnight and add a pinch of salt.
dish5Desc: Crispy cookie base, light yet flavorful durian mousse, topped with a golden mirror glaze.
dish5Tip: Bloom gelatin in cold water with a 1:5 ratio for 5 minutes.
ctaMatTitle: Start with the highest quality fresh durian
ctaMatDesc: Every recipe is perfect when you choose the right ingredients. Fresh cut Ri6, Musang King delivered.
nutriTitle: Surprising Health Benefits of the King of Fruits
nutriDesc: Discover the abundant energy and minerals in every piece of durian.
nutriSec1Desc: Each serving provides a complex matrix of essential nutrients, surpassing most tropical fruits.
vitCDesc: Daily Value (DV). Powerful antioxidant, supports immune system.
potassiumDesc: Regulates blood pressure and supports healthy muscle function.
fiberDesc: Excellent digestive support, maintains fullness and balances gut flora.
caloriesDesc: Clean energy source from complex carbs and healthy plant fats.
energyDesc: Durian contains high carbohydrates for quick energy, while fats and fiber ensure slow release.
moodDesc: Rich in Tryptophan which converts to Serotonin and Melatonin, reducing stress.
moodQuote: "One serving of durian can significantly support natural sleep cycles."
digestionDesc: Soluble fiber acts as a natural prebiotic, nourishing beneficial gut bacteria.
heartDesc: Rich in potassium and healthy monounsaturated fats to control blood pressure.
presTitle: How to keep durian fresh for days
presIntro: Durian offers a luxurious culinary experience, but preserving it perfectly requires art and precision.
presSec1Desc: Once opened, oxidation begins. The storage environment must simulate perfect coolness and dryness.
presSec2Desc: Durian aroma can easily taint other foods. Choosing the right container is crucial.
boxGlass: Glass container with rubber seal: The optimal choice.
wrapPE: Double food wrap: Wrap tightly with 2-3 layers of high-quality PE wrap.
presSec3Desc: Freezing is ideal for preserving flavor across seasons, but doing it wrong breaks the cellular structure.
freezeStep1: Remove seeds (optional): Save space and easier to use later.
freezeStep3: Slow thaw: Move from freezer to fridge for 4-6 hours.
sidebarDesc: Carefully selected, hand-peeled, and vacuum-sealed, preserving the perfect flavor delivered to you.
selTitle: How to choose a ripe durian by sound and smell
selDesc: Listening to the tap and recognizing the aroma are the most important skills.
selIntro1: Choosing a good durian is an art passed down through generations.
selIntro2: Master these 4 golden rules to always bring home the perfect durian.
tip1Desc: Use your knuckles to lightly tap. A perfect ripe one will sound deep and hollow.
tip1S2: Deep, hollow sound = flesh separated = ripe
tip1S3: Solid sound = unripe or forced ripe
tip2Desc: Aroma is the true language of durian. A ripe one emits a sweet, rich smell.
tip2S4: No smell or grassy smell = unripe
tip3Desc: A keen eye is your first tool. Quality durians have even shells and hard thorns.
tip3S1: Big, round, solid stem = well nourished
tip4Desc: Lift it up. A good one should feel heavy for its size, indicating thick flesh.
tip4S1: Compare similar sizes — choose the heavier one
quoteText: "A good buyer doesn't need to look inside. They read it through sound, smell, and weight."
mis1Desc: Deep yellow doesn't mean it's ripe. Rely on smell and sound.
mis2Desc: Incubating green durians yields bland flavor and mushy texture.
mis3Desc: Usually a sign of forced or over-ripeness. Only buy when you crack it yourself.
ctaDesc: If you're still not confident, let us choose for you. Every durian is expert-certified.
